problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
